headline: Precision BioSciences (DTIL) Reports Q1 Loss, Tops Revenue Estimates
summary: Precision BioSciences (DTIL) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of -25.93% and +40.75%, respectively, for the quarter ended March 2026. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?
